allow: Bash(curl -s http://localhost:8080/chat/completions -X POST -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{""""model"""":""""test"""",""""messages"""":[{""""role"""":""""system"""",""""content"""":""""You are a helpful assistant. Respond with valid JSON only, no markdown code blocks. Format: {\\""""thought\\"""": \\""""...\\"""", \\""""function\\"""": \\""""...\\"""", \\""""arguments\\"""": {...}}""""}],""""max_tokens"""":200}')
Bash(OPENAI_API_KEY=$OPENAI_API_KEY uv run python main.py t14 t17 t18 t19 t20 2>&1)
Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "from dispatch import Dispatch, init_vm; print\('Import OK'\)")

Bash(BENCHMARK_ID=bitgn/pac1-dev BENCHMARK_HOST=https://api.bitgn.com MODEL_ID=qwen3.5 timeout 10 uv run python -c "
from bitgn.harness_connect import HarnessServiceClientSync
from bitgn.harness_pb2 import GetBenchmarkRequest, StartPlaygroundRequest

client = HarnessServiceClientSync\('https://api.bitgn.com'\)
res = client.get_benchmark\(GetBenchmarkRequest\(benchmark_id='bitgn/pac1-dev'\)\)
for task in res.tasks:
    if task.task_id == 't02':
        print\(f'Task ID: {task.task_id}'\)
        print\(f'Instruction: {task.instruction}'\)
        break
" 2>&1)

Bash(OPENAI_API_KEY="" python3 -c "
from bitgn.harness_connect import HarnessServiceClientSync
from bitgn.harness_pb2 import GetBenchmarkRequest
client = HarnessServiceClientSync\('https://api.bitgn.com'\)
res = client.get_benchmark\(GetBenchmarkRequest\(benchmark_id='bitgn/sandbox'\)\)
for task in res.tasks:
    print\(f'{task.task_id}: {task.title[:60]}...' if len\(task.title\) > 60 else f'{task.task_id}: {task.title}'\)
" 2>&1)
Bash(timeout 300 bash -c 'while curl -s https://vm-02klrieq716cjos.eu.bitgn.com/status >/dev/null 2>&1; do sleep 5; done; echo ""Task completed""')

Bash(OPENAI_API_KEY="" python3 -c "
import sys
sys.path.insert\(0, 'pac1-sgr'\)
from bitgn.harness_connect import HarnessServiceClientSync
from bitgn.harness_pb2 import GetBenchmarkRequest
client = HarnessServiceClientSync\('https://api.bitgn.com'\)
res = client.get_benchmark\(GetBenchmarkRequest\(benchmark_id='bitgn/pac1-dev'\)\)
for task in res.tasks:
    if 't21' == task.task_id:
        print\(f'{task.task_id}: {task.title}'\)
        print\(f'{task.instruction[:500]}'\)
" 2>&1)
Bash(BENCHMARK_ID=bitgn/pac1-dev uv run python main.py t03 2>&1)

hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_response.filePath' | { read -r f; if [[ "$f" == *.py ]]; then .venv/bin/python -m pytest -xvs "$f" 2>&1 || true; fi } 2>/dev/null || true
